# thick

**Type Property**

A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a thick line.

## Declaration

```swift
static var thick: CTUnderlineStyle { get }
```

## Constants

- **single**: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a single line.
- **double**: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a double line.

items.description: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a single line.
items.name: single

items.description: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a double line.
